info.description: Provides conversion/transformation services from a source to a target CRS. A coordinate operation is a conversion if the source and target CRS share the same datum; the operation is called transformation if datum transformations are involved, i.e. source and target CRS do not share the same datum.
info.title: CRS Conversion Service

post.description: Convert a list of trajectory stations, given the unit and spatial context and a reference point in 3D where MD==0.

503.description: CRS-converter overloaded; try again later. See HttpHeader 'Retry-After'.
CRS-converter overloaded; try again later. See HttpHeader 'Retry-After'.

post.summary: Convert a GeoJSON or AnyCrsGeoJson structure
post.description: Convert a GeoJSON or AnyCrsGeoJson structure to a specified target CRS. GeoJSON is declared - by definition - to be in the context of WGS 84.

503.description: CRS-converter overloaded; try again later. See HttpHeader 'Retry-After'.

trajectoryCRS.description: Coordinate reference system for the reference point; typically the CRS is a projected CRS; if a geographic CRS is provided, the unitXY must be defined and the azimuthReference must be TrueNorth.

unitXY.description: The horizontal unit of the dx, dy in the output trajectory stations.

unitZ.description: The vertical unit of the dz in the output trajectory stations.

unitDls.description: The unit of the dog leg severity (DLS) in the output trajectory stations.

localCRS.description: Coordinate Reference System for the local, True North oriented, true distance, engineering CRS with origin at the well's surface location.

method.description: The computation method used - 'AzimuthalEquidistant' (default) or 'LMP' (Lee's modified proposal SPE96813).

operationsApplied.description: The list of operations, which have been applied to the points

operationsApplied: derived GN from TN azimuth by grid convergence 1.470400
computed deflections via minimum curvature method
to WGS 84: conversion from ED_1950_UTM_Zone_32N to GCS_European_1950; 11 points converted
to WGS 84: transformation GCS_European_1950 to GCS_WGS_1984 using ED_1950_To_WGS_1984_23; 11 points successfully transformed

ConvertTrajectoryResponse.description: Trajectory response data structure; contains the context (crs, units).

md.description: MD (measured depth) from vertical reference point in 'unitZ'.

inclination.description: Inclination angle in degrees of arc, 0.0 is vertical, 90.0 is horizontal.

azimuthTN.description: True North azimuth angle in degrees of arc, 0.0/360.0 is North.

azimuthGN.description: Grid North azimuth angle in degrees of arc, 0.0/360.0 is North.

dxTN.description: True E-W deviation in the local Cartesian engineering CRS from the well reference point; unit is given by container's 'unitXY'.

dyTN.description: True N-S deviation in the local Cartesian engineering CRS from the well reference point; Y is aligned with TrueNorth; unit is given by container's 'unitXY'.

point.description: Trajectory station point in trajectoryCRS and vertical unit as defined in container's 'unitZ'.

dls.description: Curvature, Dog Leg Severity, measured in 'unitDls'.

original.description: Original trajectory station if true, interpolated trajectory station if false.

TrajectoryStationOut.description: Output trajectory station record; context is provided by the container.

ErrorResponse.description: Response resulting of a failed CRS convertion operation

trajectoryCRS.description: Coordinate reference system for the reference point; typically the CRS is a projected CRS; if a geographic CRS is provided, the unitXY must be defined and the azimuthReference must be TrueNorth. The property value could be a persistable reference string or a record ID

azimuthReference.description: Azimuth reference for the input trajectory station azimuth values (TrueNorth or GridNorth)

unitXY.description: The horizontal unit of the dx, dy in the input trajectory stations; the unit must be a length unit in persistable reference or a record ID, see example.

unitZ.description: The vertical unit of the dz in the input trajectory stations; the unit could be a persistable reference or a record ID

referencePoint.description: The 3D reference point in the 'trajectoryCRS' where MD==0.

inputStations.description: The array of input trajectory stations

method.description: The computation method - 'AzimuthalEquidistant' (default) or 'LMP' (Lee's modified proposal SPE96813)

inputKind.description: The kind of input; one of MD_Incl_Azim (default), MD_X_Y_Z, MD_dX_dY_dZ, X_Y_Z, dX_dY_dZ. MD stands for measured depth; MD_X_Y_Z/X_Y_Z stand for absolute coordinates in the reference CRS, MD_dX_dY_dZ/dX_dY_dZ stand for deviations relative to the reference point.

interpolate.description: Perform trajectory interpolation on demand; default is true.

ConvertTrajectoryRequest.description: Input trajectory data structure; contains the context (crs, units, azimuth reference, method)

md.description: MD (measured depth) from vertical reference point in 'unitZ'.

inclination.description: Inclination angle in degrees of arc, 0.0 is vertical, 90.0 is horizontal.

azimuth.description: Azimuth angle in degrees of arc, 0.0/360.0 is North; reference given by azimuthReference (TrueNorth or GridNorth).

dx.description: E-W deviation in the local Cartesian engineering CRS from the well reference point; unit is given by container's 'unitXY' or projected 'trajectoryCRS'.

dy.description: N-S deviation in the local Cartesian engineering CRS from the well reference point; Y is aligned with azimuth reference (TrueNorth or projected GridNorth); unit is given by container's 'unitXY' or projected 'trajectoryCRS'.

dz.description: True vertical deviation in the local Cartesian engineering CRS from the well reference point; unit is given by container's unitZ; downwards positive.

TrajectoryStationIn.description: Input trajectory station record; context is provided by the container.

successCount.description: Number of points successfully converted. If the number is less than the request array length conversion/transformation failures occurred.

points.description: Converted points; length and order of the array is the same as in the request. Points, which failed to convert, are returned as NaN.

operationsApplied.description: The list of operations, which have been applied to the points

operationsApplied: conversion from RD_New to GCS_Amersfoort; 1 points converted
transformation GCS_Amersfoort to GCS_WGS_1984 using Amersfoort_To_WGS_1984_2; 1 points successfully transformed
conversion from GCS_WGS_1984 to WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_32N; 1 points converted

ConvertPointsResponse.description: Response of a CRS conversion/transformation operation

fromCRS.description: Source CRS as persistable reference string or a record ID

toCRS.description: Target CRS as persistable reference string or a record ID

points.description: List of points to be converted

ConvertPointsRequest.description: Request to convert a set of points from a source CRS to a target CRS.

ConvertGeoJsonRequest.title: Convert GeoJson/AnyCrsGeoJson Request
ConvertGeoJsonRequest.description: Request to convert a GeoJSON FeatureCollection or AnyCrsFeatureCollection from WGS 84 or AnyCrsFeatureCollection.persistableReferenceCrs to a target CRS.

toCRS.title: GeoJson Request
toCRS.description: The GeoJSON FeatureCollection or AnyCrsFeatureCollection structure to be converted/transformed. GeoJSON is always based on WGS 84; AnyCrsFeatureCollection carries the CRS context in the persistableReferenceCrs property. This value could be persistable reference string or a record ID

toUnitZ.description: The vertical axis unit for this AnyCrsGeoJsonFeatureCollection as persistable reference string or a record ID)
toUnitZ.title: Vertical Unit

ConvertGeoJsonResponse.title: Convert GeoJSON/AnyCrsGeoJson response
ConvertGeoJsonResponse.description: Response of a CRS conversion/transformation operation involving GeoJSON FeatureCollection or AnyCrsFeatureCollection.

totalCount.description: The total number of coordinates in the GeoJSON FeatureCollection or AnyCrsFeatureCollection.

successCount.description: The number of coordinates in the GeoJSON FeatureCollection or AnyCrsFeatureCollection successfully converted/transformed. If this number is less than totalCount then conversion/transformation errors have occurred.

operationsApplied.description: The list of operations, which have been applied to the points

operationsApplied: conversion from SAD_1969_UTM_Zone_23S to GCS_South_American_1969; 4 points converted
transformation GCS_South_American_1969 to GCS_WGS_1984 using SAD_1969_To_WGS_1984_4; 4 points successfully transformed

persistableReferenceCrs.description: The spatial context of this AnyCrsGeoJsonFeatureCollection as persistable reference string.
persistableReferenceCrs.title: Spatial Reference

CoordinateReferenceSystemID.description: The spatial context of this AnyCrsGeoJsonFeatureCollection as a record ID. If both CoordinateReferenceSystemID and persistableReferenceCrs exist, CoordinateReferenceSystemID takes precedence.
CoordinateReferenceSystemID.title: Spatial Reference

VerticalUnitID.description: The vertical axis unit for this AnyCrsGeoJsonFeatureCollection as a record ID. If both VerticalUnitID and persistableReferenceUnitZ exist, VerticalUnitID takes precedence.
VerticalUnitID.title: Vertical Unit

persistableReferenceUnitZ.description: The vertical axis unit for this AnyCrsGeoJsonFeatureCollection as persistable reference string.
persistableReferenceUnitZ.title: Vertical Unit
